hooks.command: [ "${SUB_CLAUDE:-}" = "1" ] || exit 0; printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"You are a sub-claude instance. Do not use EnterPlanMode — discuss plans inline instead."}'
[ "${SUB_CLAUDE:-}" = "1" ] || exit 0; printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"You are a sub-claude instance. Do not use AskUserQuestion — ask questions inline with lettered options (A, B, C)."}'

[ "${SUB_CLAUDE:-}" = "1" ] || exit 0; input=$(cat); if printf '%s
' "$input" | grep -qE 'sub-claude .* pool\s+(stop|gc|destroy)' && ! printf '%s
' "$input" | grep -qE 'sub-claude .*-C '; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"You are a sub-claude agent. Cannot stop/gc/destroy your own sub-claude pool. Use -C to target a different pool."}'; exit 0; fi; printf '%s
' "$input" | grep -q '"command"' && exit 0; printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"You are a sub-claude agent. EnterWorktree is blocked — worktrees trap the sub-claude slot in a different directory."}'
